dismissed_comment: gray-matter ^4.0.3 with engines: {} disables all custom YAML engines, preventing code injection. Inline comment added to kb-reader.ts documenting this mitigation.

Designed behavior: credential helper written with restrictive permissions (0o700), used by git, then deleted. Cleanup logic already exists.
Designed behavior: credential helper written with restrictive permissions (0o700), used by git, then deleted. Cleanup logic already exists.
TOCTOU in build-time/server-side file reads of local files. Not security-sensitive — no privilege escalation path.
TOCTOU in build-time/server-side file reads of local files. Not security-sensitive — no privilege escalation path.
Well-mitigated: temp file in /tmp with random UUID, mode 0o700, cleaned in finally block, short-lived GitHub App token (~1h), server-side only, founder-gated.
File was refactored to 68 lines — alert references line 121 which no longer exists.
3-layer rate limiting: IP-based connection throttle + concurrent unauthenticated cap + per-user session throttle. Memory bounded with periodic pruning.
Expected behavior: file upload handler. Filename through sanitizeFilename(), path validated with isPathInWorkspace(), extension allowlist enforced, 20MB size cap.
Test fixture; hardcoded Supabase URL from env var
GitHub API base URL is hardcoded constant. Paths are from server-side callers only, not user input. DELETE method rejected for cloud agents.
3-layer path containment: realpathSync + symlink resolution + ELOOP/EACCES denial + trailing slash prefix guard. TOCTOU mitigated by bubblewrap sandbox.
Bounded timer with .unref(); cleared on connection teardown; 30min idle timeout. Subscription status refresh interval, not unbounded.
randomCredentialPath() generates random temp file; mode 0o700; token passed via heredoc; cleaned in finally block. Short-lived git credential helper.
Symlink guards at isDirectory/isFile checks. TOCTOU race mitigated by bubblewrap sandbox + single-invocation atomicity. Server-controlled filesystem.
Test file; paths are controlled test fixtures, not user input
Test file; paths are controlled test fixtures, not user input
URL is PLAUSIBLE_EVENTS_URL env var; hardcoded, no user input reaches URL construction. Plausible analytics proxy.
Props stripped of user_id/userId before forwarding; origin validated via validateOrigin(). Event properties allowlisted at source.

writeFileSync to .claude/ under user workspace. Prod workspacePath=/workspaces/<uuid>/ (dedicated volume, not shared tmp). Pre-refactor had identical writes; extraction into helper triggered taint on WORKSPACES_ROOT env. UUID_RE upstream prevents traversal.

writeFileSync to .claude/ under user workspace. Prod workspacePath=/workspaces/<uuid>/ (dedicated volume, not shared tmp). Pre-refactor had identical writes; extraction into helper triggered taint on WORKSPACES_ROOT env. UUID_RE upstream prevents traversal.

Test fixture writes to /tmp/soleur-test-workspaces-symlink/external/ — deliberate: the test verifies scaffoldWorkspaceDefaults REJECTS symlinks pointing outside the workspace, so the target file must be created outside the workspace-under-test.
